item.text: I found one concrete remaining gap that’s worth closing in this pass: Copilot is schema-valid for `epic_verifiers` and `epic_synthesizer`, but I hadn’t added end-to-end tests for those two runtime paths yet. I’m adding one real CLI-path integration test for each now; everything else in this pass reads as either already-covered generics or broader-than-closeout behavior.

item.text:
**findings fixed (id, summary, files changed)**

- `P3-F1`: Added end-to-end Copilot epic-verifier coverage so a schema-valid `epic_verifiers` Copilot lane is now exercised through the real `epic-verify` CLI path and exact `copilot -p ... -s --model ...` subprocess flags.
  Files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts)

- `P3-F2`: Added end-to-end Copilot epic-synthesizer coverage so a schema-valid `epic_synthesizer` Copilot role is now exercised through the real `epic-synthesize` CLI path and exact `copilot -p ... -s --model ...` subprocess flags.
  Files changed: [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts)

**findings surfaced to orchestrator (id, summary, why uncertain)**

- `P3-S1`: Shared parser exactness for naked payloads with extra fields remains broader than the tech-design wording.
  Why uncertain: the current parser relies on non-`strict()` Zod object schemas across multiple command payloads, so tightening extra-field rejection would be a cross-cutting runtime-contract change with broader blast radius than this closeout dispatch.

**files changed in this pass**

- [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-verify-command.test.ts)
- [processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts](/Users/leemoore/code/liminal-spec/processes/impl-cli/tests/epic-synthesize-command.test.ts)

**gate result after this pass (pass / fail / not-run)**

- Pass

`bun run capture:test-baseline --force && bun run green-verify` passed.

- Final test count: 241
